purpose: Introduce a physical constraint (the spectacles) and transition the characters into the city proper.
summary: To protect them from being blinded by the city's brilliance, the Guardian forces Dorothy, her companions, and Toto to wear green-lensed spectacles. The Guardian locks the glasses onto their heads with a key he keeps, then leads them through the gates and into the streets of the Emerald City.
production_intent: Establish the physical restriction of green-lensed spectacles on all travelers to manage visual brilliance. The sequence transitions the group from a state of resistance/frustration into the overwhelming sensory environment of the city streets.
scene_short_description: Travelers are fitted with locked green spectacles before entering a brilliant city.
scene_primary_scale_story_point: Individual character scale (fitting glasses) expanding to group scale (entering streets).
scene_start_state: The group stands before the gates, facing the Guardian.
scene_end_state: The group moves through the gates into the bright city streets.
dominant_action_line: The Guardian forces spectacles onto the group and locks them in place.
scene_spatial_layout: Linear progression from gate threshold to street interior
Tight grouping during the fitting process
character_spatial_map: dorothy, the_scarecrow, tin_woodman, cowardly_lion, and toto clustered near guardian_of_the_gates
guardian_of_the_gates positioned as the gatekeeper/authority figure

storyboard_markdown:
# Scene Contract: CH010_SC004

## Production Intent
Establish the physical restriction of green-lensed spectacles on all travelers to manage visual brilliance. The sequence transitions the group from a state of resistance/frustration into the overwhelming sensory environment of the city streets.

## Required Cast
- dorothy
- the_scarecrow
- tin_woodman
- cowardly_lion
- toto
- guardian_of_the_gates

## Required Environments
- emerald_city_gates

## Continuity Constraints
- Uniform fit and appearance of green spectacles on all characters
- Consistent green color tint applied to camera/POV shots

## Beat List
- BT001: Guardian presents spectacles to the group
- BT002: The spectacles are fitted and locked
- BT003: The group enters the city streets
